Blaine Elementary Field - ​1420 W. Grace Street, Chicago

Register for a Class or Coach-Pitch Program

Spring Session 2 - ​April 25th thru June 13th

Click to register below.  A pre-registration drop down menu will appear at the top of the form.  From here you can choose the appropriate age group and time for your program.  Classes and Coach-Pitch Games are one hour long, and include a Lil Sluggers Shirt.  The kids will be grouped by age and skill level.  

​Classes and the Coach-Pitch Instructional Program are available on Saturday morning at 9:30, 10:30 & 11:30 am​
​
CLICK BELOW TO REGISTER:
Saturday - CLASS
Saturday COACH-PITCH Instructional Program - AGES 5 to 7
P:  (312) 945-1585
E:  [email protected]

    Enter your email to receive programming info for your lil slugger:
Submit
